_comment: KHONG CHINH SUA: TEP DUOC TAO BOI STACLOUD
name: LavaLink
author: congdongamazon@gmail.com
description: Egg Lavalink cho STACloud, cai dat tu GitHub releases va chay bang Java 21.

installation.script:
set -euo pipefail

apt update
apt install -y curl jq git ca-certificates

cd /mnt/server

AUTH_ARGS=()
if [ -n "${GITHUB_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
    echo -e "using authenticated GitHub API call"
    AUTH_ARGS=(-u "${GITHUB_USER}:${GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN}")
else
    echo -e "using anonymous GitHub API call"
fi

api_get() {
    curl -fsSL -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" "${AUTH_ARGS[@]}" "$1"
}

MATCH_FILE="${MATCH:-Lavalink.jar}"
LATEST_JSON=$(api_get "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_PACKAGE}/releases/latest")
RELEASES_JSON=$(api_get "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_PACKAGE}/releases")

if echo "${LATEST_JSON}" | jq -e '.message? == "API rate limit exceeded"' >/dev/null; then
    echo -e "GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Configure GITHUB_USER and GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN for this egg."
    exit 2
fi

DOWNLOAD_URL=""
if [ -z "${VERSION:-}" ] || [ "${VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "${LATEST_JSON}" | jq -r --arg match "${MATCH_FILE}" '.assets[]? | select(.name == $match) | .browser_download_url' | head -n 1)
else
    VERSION_CHECK=$(echo "${RELEASES_JSON}" | jq -r --arg version "${VERSION}" '.[] | select(.tag_name == $version) | .tag_name' | head -n 1)
    if [ "${VERSION}" = "${VERSION_CHECK}" ]; then
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "${RELEASES_JSON}" | jq -r --arg version "${VERSION}" --arg match "${MATCH_FILE}" '.[] | select(.tag_name == $version) | .assets[]? | select(.name == $match) | .browser_download_url' | head -n 1)
    else
        echo -e "version ${VERSION} not found, falling back to latest release"
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "${LATEST_JSON}" | jq -r --arg match "${MATCH_FILE}" '.assets[]? | select(.name == $match) | .browser_download_url' | head -n 1)
    fi
fi

if [ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ]; then
    echo -e "Could not find asset ${MATCH_FILE} in ${GITHUB_PACKAGE} release ${VERSION:-latest}."
    exit 3
fi

echo -e "Downloading ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
curl -fL -o Lavalink.jar "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
test -s Lavalink.jar

curl -fL -o application.yml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/freyacodes/Lavalink/master/LavalinkServer/application.yml.example

echo "-------------------------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed"
echo "-------------------------------------------------------"
